---
title: "STAT 432 Final Project -- Random Forest"
author: "Gwendolyn Jarrold"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(corrplot)
library(rpart)
library(rpart.plot)
library(randomForest)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(this.path)
source("TC.R")

setwd(this.path::here())
```

## Summary Statistics

```{r}
drug_cons_num <- read.csv("../data/drug_consumption_numeric.csv")

drug_cons_num$gender <- as.factor(drug_cons_num$gender)
drug_cons_num$country <- as.factor(drug_cons_num$country)
drug_cons_num$ethnicity <- as.factor(drug_cons_num$ethnicity)
drug_cons_num$choc <- as.factor(drug_cons_num$choc)

summary(drug_cons_num)
```

## Random Forest (Numeric Age and Education)  

```{r}
set.seed(432)

# Using default parameter values: 
choc_rf_default <- randomForest(choc ~ ., data = drug_cons_num, importance = TRUE)
choc_rf_default

choc_rf_def_confmat <- t(choc_rf_default$confusion[, -8])
TC(choc_rf_def_confmat)
```

```{r}
tuning_par <- expand.grid("nodesize" = seq(from = 1, to = 10, by = 1), 
                         "mtry" = seq(from = 1, to = 10, by = 1))

TC_rf <- rep(NA, nrow(tuning_par))
```

```{r}
set.seed(432)

# Tuning the ntree, mtry, and nodesize parameters:
pb <- txtProgressBar(min = 0, max = length(TC_rf), style = 3)
for (k in seq_along(TC_rf)) {
  set.seed(432)
  choc_rf <- randomForest(choc ~ ., data = drug_cons_num, 
                          ntree = 1000, 
                          nodesize = tuning_par$nodesize[k], 
                          mtry = tuning_par$mtry[k])
  TC_rf[k] <- TC(t(choc_rf$confusion[, -8]))
  setTxtProgressBar(pb, k)
}

rf_tune <- cbind(tuning_par, TC_rf)
```

```{r}
rf_best <- rf_tune[which.min(rf_tune$TC_rf), ]
rf_best
```


```{r}
rf_tune_mtry <- rf_tune %>% group_by(mtry)  %>%
                    summarise(mean_TC = mean(TC_rf), .groups = 'drop')

ggplot(data = rf_tune, aes(x = mtry, y = TC_rf)) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "darkgreen") + 
  ggtitle("Number of Variables Sampled at Each Split (mtry) vs. TC") + 
  xlab("Number of Variables Randomly Sampled at Each Split") + 
  ylab("Total Misclassification Cost") + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(from = 1, to = 10, by = 1)) + 
  geom_point(data = rf_tune_mtry, aes(x = mtry, y = mean_TC), color = "black", size = 8, shape = "-")
```

```{r}
rf_tune_nodesize <- rf_tune %>% group_by(nodesize)  %>%
                    summarise(mean_TC = mean(TC_rf), .groups = 'drop')

ggplot(data = rf_tune, aes(x = nodesize, y = TC_rf)) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "maroon") + 
  ggtitle("Minimum Size of Terminal Nodes (nodesize) vs. TC") + 
  xlab("Minimum Size of Terminal Nodes") + 
  ylab("Total Misclassification Cost") + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(from = 1, to = 10, by = 1)) + 
  geom_point(data = rf_tune_nodesize, aes(x = nodesize, y = mean_TC), color = "black", size = 8, shape = "-")
```

```{r}
set.seed(432)

# Tuned random forest model 
choc_rf_tuned <- randomForest(choc ~ ., data = drug_cons_num, 
                              ntree =  1000,
                              nodesize = rf_best$nodesize,
                              mtry = rf_best$mtry, 
                              importance = F)
choc_rf_tuned

choc_rf_tuned_confmat <- t(choc_rf_tuned$confusion[, -8])
```

```{r}
choc_rf_tuned$importance
```

```{r}
choc_rf_tuned_confmat
TC(choc_rf_tuned_confmat)
```

```{r}
write.csv(rf_tune, "../data/randomForest_bagging/rf_tune_num.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```


## Random Forest (Factor Age and Education)

```{r}
drug_cons_num$age <- as.factor(drug_cons_num$age)
drug_cons_num$education <- as.factor(drug_cons_num$education)

summary(drug_cons_num)
```

```{r}
set.seed(432)

# Using default parameter values: 
choc_rf_default_f <- randomForest(choc ~ ., data = drug_cons_num, importance = TRUE)
choc_rf_default_f

choc_rf_def_f_confmat <- choc_rf_default_f$confusion[, -8]
TC(choc_rf_def_f_confmat)
```

```{r}
tuning_par3 <- tuning_par

TC_f_rf <- rep(NA, nrow(tuning_par3))
```

```{r}
set.seed(432)

# Tuning the ntree, mtry, and nodesize parameters:

for (k in seq_along(TC_f_rf)) {
  set.seed(432) 
  choc_rf <- randomForest(choc ~ ., data = drug_cons_num, 
                          ntree = 1000, 
                          nodesize = tuning_par3$nodesize[k], 
                          mtry = tuning_par3$mtry[k])
  TC_f_rf[k] <- TC(t(choc_rf$confusion[, -8]))
}

rf_f_tune <- cbind(tuning_par3, TC_f_rf)
```

```{r}
rf_f_best <- rf_f_tune[which.min(rf_f_tune$TC_f_rf), ]
rf_f_best
```

```{r}
rf_f_tune_mtry <- rf_f_tune %>% group_by(mtry)  %>%
                    summarise(mean_TC = mean(TC_f_rf), .groups = 'drop')

ggplot(data = rf_f_tune, aes(x = mtry, y = TC_f_rf)) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "darkgreen") + 
  ggtitle("Number of Variables Sampled at Each Split (mtry) vs. TC") + 
  xlab("Number of Variables Randomly Sampled at Each Split") + 
  ylab("Total Misclassification Cost") + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(from = 1, to = 10, by = 1)) + 
  geom_point(data = rf_f_tune_mtry, aes(x = mtry, y = mean_TC), color = "black", size = 8, shape = "-")
```

```{r}
rf_f_tune_nodesize <- rf_f_tune %>% group_by(nodesize)  %>%
                    summarise(mean_TC = mean(TC_f_rf), .groups = 'drop')

ggplot(data = rf_f_tune, aes(x = nodesize, y = TC_f_rf)) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "maroon") + 
  ggtitle("Minimum Size of Terminal Nodes (nodesize) vs. TC") + 
  xlab("Minimum Size of Terminal Nodes") + 
  ylab("Total Misclassification Cost") + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(from = 1, to = 10, by = 1)) + 
  geom_point(data = rf_f_tune_nodesize, aes(x = nodesize, y = mean_TC), color = "black", size = 8, shape = "-")
```

```{r}
rf_f_tune_ntree <- rf_f_tune %>% group_by(ntree)  %>%
                    summarise(mean_TC = mean(TC_f_rf), .groups = 'drop')

ggplot(data = rf_f_tune, aes(x = ntree, y = TC_f_rf)) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "darkblue") + 
  ggtitle("Number of Trees (ntree) vs. TC") + 
  xlab("Number of Trees") + 
  ylab("Total Misclassification Cost") + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(from = 100, to = 1000, by = 50)) + 
  geom_point(data = rf_f_tune_ntree, aes(x = ntree, y = mean_TC), color = "black", size = 8, shape = "-")
```

```{r}
set.seed(432)

# Tuned random forest model 
choc_rf_f_tuned <- randomForest(choc ~ ., data = drug_cons_num, 
                              ntree =  1000,
                              nodesize = rf_f_best$nodesize,
                              mtry = rf_f_best$mtry, 
                              importance = F)
choc_rf_f_tuned

choc_rf_f_tuned_confmat <- t(choc_rf_f_tuned$confusion[, -8])
```

```{r}
choc_rf_f_tuned$importance
```

```{r}
choc_rf_f_tuned_confmat
TC(choc_rf_f_tuned_confmat)
```

```{r}
write.csv(rf_f_tune, "../data/randomForest_bagging/rf_tune_cat.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
